mapper.sql: task_id, user_id, workspace_id, thread_id, document_id, agent_id, kind, status, title, summary, stage, progress, linked_draft_id, result_artifact_id, attempt_count, max_attempts, last_error, created_at, updated_at, started_at, completed_at
mapper.select: insert into tasks () values (#{task.taskId}, #{task.userId}, #{task.workspaceId}, #{task.threadId}, #{task.documentId}, #{task.agentId}, #{task.kind}, #{task.status}, #{task.title}, #{task.summary}, #{task.stage}, #{task.progress}, #{task.linkedDraftId}, #{task.resultArtifactId}, #{task.attemptCount}, #{task.maxAttempts}, #{task.lastError}, #{task.createdAt}, #{task.updatedAt}, #{task.startedAt}, #{task.completedAt}) on conflict (user_id, workspace_id, document_id, kind) do nothing returning
mapper.update: update tasks set status = 'RUNNING', summary = coalesce(#{summary}, summary), stage = coalesce(#{stage}, stage), progress = coalesce(#{progress,jdbcType=INTEGER}, progress), last_error = null, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, started_at = #{updatedAt}, completed_at = null where user_id = #{userId} and task_id = #{taskId} and ( status = 'QUEUED' or (status = 'RUNNING' and (started_at is null or started_at <= #{staleRunningBefore})) )
